stemHtml: Approaching Bern for a visual approach, Tower says: "F-SN, JOIN RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 HEIGHT 1000 FEET QFE 1002". Correct readback?

options.b: JOINING RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 HEIGHT 1000 FEET QFE 1002, F-SN
options.c: JOINING RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 HEIGHT 1000 FEET QFE 1002, F-SN
options.d: JOINING RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 ALTITUDE 1000 FEET QFE 1002, F-SN
